title: Pernicar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Pernicar''' may refer to either of the following:
*'''[[Pernicar]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who fought in the [[New Sith Wars]]
*'''[[Pernicar (planet)|Pernicar]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Hoth's Brand system|Ruusan system]] that was named after him

{{Disambig}}
